mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer
customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
SELECT id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM customer WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status, created_time, updated_time FROM customer WHERE customer_code = #{customerCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer ( customer_code, customer_name, contact_person, phone, address, remark, status ) VALUES ( #{customerCode}, #{customerName}, #{contactPerson}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{remark}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE customer SET customer_name = #{customerName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
